title: Steeped SMP
description:
A pack of chocolatey, strawberry goodness to go alongside the vanilla experience. 
This is a pack for personal friends, and the server pack is not provided.
body:
### [Steeped SMP is for a private server]
### You can download it, but there are server-side mods that are not provided here

Steeped adds a a lot of vanilla-enhancement mods to make the survival experience much more enjoyable. Elements like enhancements to food, expansion of magic systems, Create, and more!

**More Food!**
- Farmer's Delight + expansions, designed to provide a more nuanced and in-depth food system
- **Let's Do Series** of mods, such as Brewery, Herbal Brews, Vinery, and Bakery
- Seasons letting you think more attentively about which crops you should grow and when
**Furniture!**
- Both _Handcrafted_ and _Another Furniture Mod_ are provided for all furniture needs
- Cluttered for even more filling out of your home decor
- Chimes
- Connectible Chains so you can use chains in more ways for decorations
- Plushies! Perfect Plushies and Blahaj

**Magic!**
- Arcanus Continuum
- Botania
- Spectrum
- Origins! Including Origins Minus and the Touhou Origins

**Tech!**
- Create!
  - Bells & Whistles
  - Slice & Dice for automation of Farmer's Delight
  - Crafts & Additions
- Ad Astra

**Etc. Additions**
- Supplementaries
  - Squared
  - Amendments
- Artifacts
- Mighty Mail
- NiftyCarts
- Spyglass Astronomy
- Money (Numismatic Overhaul)
- Camera (Exposure)
